title: MANAGER
description:
Job Description & Requirements

Responsibilities

- Oversee daily clinic operations.
- Drive sales of TCM packages, products, and services, and develop strategies to improve profitability.
- Manage, mentor, and train clinic staff to ensure high-quality service and performance.
- Ensure the clinic adheres to health and safety regulations.
- Handle customer inquiries, feedback, and complaints effectively.
- Manage inventory, including stocking and ordering TCM medicine and equipment.

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Minimum GCE 'O' Levels or equivalent qualification
  • At least 1-2 years of relevant experience

hiringCompany.description:
CHI HONG TONG TCM CLINIC: Where Ancient Wisdom Embraces Tomorrow's Wellness

In Singapore's heart, a new beacon of holistic health arises. Welcome to CHI HONG TONG TCM CLINIC, a sanctuary where timeless Traditional Chinese Medicine gracefully integrates with pioneering technology. Our name reflects our mission: to guide you on a personalized path to optimal health and vitality. We are your dedicated partner in cultivating lifelong wellness.

The Soul of Healing: Masterful TCM Care

At our core is an unwavering commitment to authentic TCM. We offer comprehensive consultations, acupuncture, customized herbal prescriptions, tuina, and cupping. Each treatment is a personalized strategy designed to address the root cause of your ailment and restore your body's innate balance.

Guiding this journey is our Principal Physician, whose dedication spans over 31 years. This vast experience brings an intuitive diagnostic skill and a nuanced approach to healing, offering you care of an unparalleled standard.

A Singaporean First: Signature Salt Therapy

As a pioneer, we are proud to be the first TCM clinic in Singapore with a dedicated Halotherapy suite. This serene environment, filled with pharmaceutical-grade salt particles, provides a powerful, non-invasive therapy for respiratory and skin health. It effectively alleviates asthma, allergies, and eczema, while promoting deep relaxation and strengthening immunity.

A Specialized Focus: Nurturing Women & Children

With a gentle spirit, we focus on the unique health journeys of women and children. Our treatments support women through all life stages—from fertility and motherhood to menopause—addressing hormonal balance and emotional well-being with expertise.

For our young patients, we use gentle pediatric tuina and mild herbal formulas to strengthen their immune systems, improve digestion, and support healthy growth.

The Intelligent Clinic: Integrating AI for Precision

Embracing the future, we integrate AI intelligent devices to enhance diagnostic precision. From AI-assisted tongue and pulse analysis to smart progress monitoring, this technology allows us to offer care that is both deeply personal and empirically informed.

Your Wellness Ecosystem: Curated TCM Products

To support your health at home, we offer a curated selection of high-quality TCM products. This includes meticulously sourced herbal extracts, premium herbs, and wellness teas, all vetted for purity and efficacy.

Your Invitation to Harmony

CHI HONG TONG TCM CLINIC is a promise of masterful care, compassionate expertise, and innovative wellness. We invite you to step into a new era of holistic health with us.
hiringCompany.name: CHI HONG TONG TCM (CLINICS) PTE. LTD.
